description: Accounts of a slaughterer. Goitein dates it to 1179 or 1183 CE (Med Soc I, 381–82). This sheet was then reused for piyyutim. For further information, see Goitein's note cards on this shelfmark and on T-S 12.834 (PGPID 7353). The hand is that of Yedutun ha-Levi, and these fragments also contain poems of his alongside the accounts.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
